/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/picolog_t.dir/picolog/picolog.c.o -o picolog_t  libpicoquic-log.a libpicoquic-core.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.1/lib/libssl.dylib ../../../_deps/picotls-build/libpicotls-openssl.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.1/lib/libcrypto.dylib ../../../_deps/picotls-build/libpicotls-minicrypto.a ../../../_deps/picotls-build/libpicotls-core.a
